episodes.title: A Cult, a Terror Attack… and This Video Game
episodes.description:
A Japanese cult, a real terror attack, and a strange piece of media that followed.

In 1995, Aum Shinrikyo carried out the Tokyo subway sarin attack, one of the deadliest acts of domestic terrorism in modern Japanese history. In the years surrounding the attack, the group produced a range of unusual media, including propaganda, music, and video content.

One of the most obscure is a little-known PC title often referred to as The Story of Kamikuishiki Village, often described online as an “Aum cult video game”.

But what actually is it? Was it made by the cult itself, or is the story more complicated?

This video breaks down what we know, what has been misreported, and why this strange artefact continues to circulate decades later.
